comment: Excellent tractor, engine was smooth and fuel consumption was very low. Completed my entire wheat field in one day without any issues.
Good tractor overall. Hydraulic system worked perfectly and the tyres had good grip on my field. Minor dust on the seat but acceptable.
Reliable machine. Got all my ploughing done on time. Fuel efficiency was decent and the gear shifting was smooth throughout.
Absolutely brilliant tractor. Freshly serviced, spotlessly clean and power delivery was incredible. Best rental experience I have had.
Zero complaints. The dual clutch system made operation effortless and the engine pulled through even the hardest patches of soil.
Like a brand new tractor. Deep ploughing in black cotton soil was done effortlessly. Highly recommend this machine to any farmer.
John Deere never disappoints. The PTO worked flawlessly and the operator cabin was very comfortable for long hours of work.
Very good machine. Advanced hydraulics made attachment changes quick and easy. Fuel usage was slightly high but performance was top class.
Exceptional tractor. Cotton field preparation was done in record time. Everything from the tyres to the PTO shaft was in perfect condition.
Plough got the job done but the reversing mechanism was a bit stiff. Had to apply extra force to flip. Frame had some rust marks.
Average experience. The moldboards worked fine for wheat field preparation but share edges felt slightly blunt compared to expectations.
Decent plough for the price. Worked well in loamy soil. The depth control was adjustable and soil inversion was uniform across the field.
All five discs cut through hard soil without any choking. Bearings were well greased and the gang angle adjustment was smooth.
Good disc plough. Made easy work of black cotton soil which is usually difficult. Minor surface rust on frame but nothing affecting performance.
Outstanding performance on my soybean field. Fast ploughing, low draft and disc blades were razor sharp. Very satisfied with the rental.
The plough was quite old and the shares were blunt. Had to make multiple passes on some patches. Skimmers were damaged and not fully functional.
Work got done but it was not a smooth experience. Rust on moldboards and depth adjustment was stiff. Expected better condition for the price.
Below average condition. Frame was structurally okay but operational parts were worn out. Would not rent this plough again.
Brilliant harrow. Disc blades were razor sharp and soil pulverization was excellent in a single pass. Bearings smooth with zero noise.
Top quality equipment. Used it for seedbed preparation after paddy harvest. Gang angle adjustment was precise and scrapers worked perfectly.
Very good harrow. Covered the field quickly and soil crumbling was uniform. Slightly overpriced compared to similar equipment in the area.
Some springs felt weaker than others leading to uneven penetration depth across rows. Basic work done but not consistently.
Decent cultivator for inter-row weed control. Shovels were reasonably sharp and depth control was working fine. Good value for money.
Average condition. Levelling board was slightly bent and two tynes had reduced spring tension. Serviceable but needs maintenance.
Premium European cultivator and the quality shows. Every tyne penetrated uniformly and the seedbed was perfectly prepared in one pass.
Outstanding cultivator. Duck-foot shovels were very sharp and stubble incorporation was thorough. Definitely worth the rental price.
Excellent build quality and performance. Depth control was precise down to the centimetre. Slightly higher rental cost but justified by quality.
Seed placement was very accurate and germination was uniform across all 9 rows. Fertilizer box had a minor crack but was sealed and functional.
Good seed drill. Covered a large area quickly and seed rate was consistent throughout. Press wheels ensured good soil contact.
Superb seed drill. Mustard sowing was done with perfect row spacing. No seed wastage and the metering unit was very accurate.
Excellent for direct wheat sowing after paddy. Saved significant time and moisture was conserved well. Drive chain was slightly loose but manageable.
Concept is great but furrow openers showed wear and depth was not perfectly consistent in very hard soil. Still a useful machine overall.
Very useful for conservation tillage farming. Barley sowing was done efficiently. Seed and fertilizer placement was accurate and crop emerged well.
World class seed drill. Finger pickup metering is flawless and maize population was exactly as set. Not a single seed was damaged.
Best precision sowing experience I have had. Each row had identical plant spacing and the depth was consistent throughout the entire field.
Excellent precision drill. Sunflower sowing was perfect. Only minor feedback is that the rental price is on the higher side for small farmers.
Boom sprayer covered a wide area very efficiently. All nozzles were spraying uniformly and pressure was stable throughout the operation.
Good sprayer for large fields. Completed pesticide application on cotton in very less time. Two nozzles had slight wear but still functional.
Average experience. One boom section had a pressure drop and required adjustment mid-operation. Tank was clean but hose had minor stiffness.
Lightweight and easy to carry across the vegetable field. Engine started on first pull every time. Good spray range and coverage.
Perfect for small farm spraying. Anti-vibration handle made it comfortable even after long use. Tank capacity was adequate for my groundnut field.
Decent sprayer but engine felt slightly underpowered for thick canopy crops. Fine for open row vegetables. Nozzle adjustment was easy to use.
Commercial grade machine. GPS auto-steer made zero-overlap passes and the 36 metre boom covered my entire sugarcane field in under two hours.
Incredible machine. Section control ensured no double spraying on headlands. Chemical savings were significant. Worth every rupee of the rental.
Exceptional sprayer but the rental cost is very high. Performance is undeniable though. For large commercial fields it is absolutely worth it.
Compact harvester worked fine for small paddy plots. Engine had minor oil seepage but did not affect operation. Grain loss was within limits.
Good mini combine for tight field spaces. Easy to maneuver in narrow plots. Threshing efficiency was good and clean grain output was satisfactory.
Average performance. Worked on small wheat field but controls felt slightly dated. Body had dents and the machine showed its age during long runs.
Powerful combine that handled my large wheat field effortlessly. Straw chopper worked great and grain tank capacity meant fewer stops.
Excellent harvester. 4WD handled my soft paddy field without getting stuck. Grain unloading was fast and clean. Zero breakdowns throughout.
Very solid combine. Soybean harvesting was clean with minimal pod shatter loss. Rental price is high but the output quality justifies it.
Reliable Punjabi combine that knows wheat harvesting. Twin straw walkers handled thick crop well. Hydraulic reel adjustment was very responsive.
Good all-round combine. Paddy drum was fitted and rice harvesting was clean. Grain tank size was slightly small for my field size but manageable.
Decent harvester but engine needed an oil top-up during use. Performance was consistent after that. Slightly older machine but still gets the job done.
Heavy duty rotavator that powered through paddy stubble without choking. Crumbler roller gave a nice fine tilth. Blades showed some wear but worked.
Several blades are due for replacement. Rotavation depth was inconsistent in a few rows. Gearbox was fine but overall blade condition needs attention.
Good rotavator for the price. Prepared a decent seedbed for wheat after rice crop. Hood had minor dents but operation was not affected.
Side shift feature was very useful for inter-row work in sugarcane. Chain drive was well tensioned and depth adjustment worked smoothly.
Blades were quite worn which affected penetration in hard soil. Side shift mechanism worked fine though. Needs blade replacement before next season.
Useful rotavator for cotton inter-row cultivation. Full 45 cm lateral shift worked as expected. Depth was consistent and weed control was effective.
Nearly new rotavator and the quality is exceptional. Blades cut through hard clay soil like butter. Hydraulic depth control was precise to the last centimetre.
Top of the line rotavator. Covered 8 feet in one pass with perfect soil pulverization. Gearbox was solid and there was zero vibration during operation.
Brilliant machine. Used it for mustard seedbed preparation and the result was a perfectly fine tilth. Heavy duty gearbox handled full load without any heating.
Beaters are badly worn and threshing efficiency was poor. Had to run grain through twice to get clean separation. Needs urgent maintenance.
Manageable for gram threshing but not ideal. One sieve had mesh damage leading to some grain loss with chaff. PTO coupling worked fine.
Disappointed with the condition. Cleaning fan had imbalance noise and threshing output had too much broken grain. Would not rent again.
Good paddy thresher. Axial drum separated grain cleanly with minimal breakage. Blower was effective at removing chaff from the output.
Reliable paddy thresher. Concave clearance adjustment was easy and output was clean. Belt tension was good and there were no unexpected stops.
Excellent threshing speed and clean grain output. Processed my entire paddy harvest in half the time I expected. Very happy with the rental.
Rubber padded drum was gentle on maize kernels and grain damage was very low. Cyclone cleaning system was effective and output was clean.
Excellent maize sheller. Zero cob pieces in the grain output and shelling speed was impressive. Cob discharge chute worked without any blockage.
Very good sheller for the price. Feed hopper was large enough for bulk feeding and the PTO coupling was smooth throughout operation.
